scope: Complete interaction-first replacements for the two rejected infrastructure pilots.
policy: Survey artifacts seed mechanics only. All shipped presentation, geometry, simulation code, and grading logic are original procedural HTML, CSS, JavaScript, or Python. No third-party media is redistributed.

moving_checkbox_evasive_button.influence: A familiar checkbox that evades direct pointer acquisition.
moving_checkbox_evasive_button.transformation: A four-shaft scroll-topology cage with fixed-step cursor-repulsion physics, aligned portal collision, active herding, and a permanent physical clamp.

reverse_identity_gate.influence: Reverse-CAPTCHA framing in which the participant proves robot identity.
reverse_identity_gate.transformation: A distributed eight-relay robot handshake across four real browser tabs with live phase tracking, keyboard-driven receivers, mouse contact, and independently replayed temporal state.
